title: Incredible Custom Swords
description: Adds many custom swords with cool effects! Adds 36 custom items.
body:
**Do you want more custom swords in your Minecraft world?**

This mod offers many different custom swords in Minecraft from elemental swords like the frozen sword to a sword which summons helpers and swords which can steal the health or hunger from an entity and you can take it. Most of the swords have crafting recipes and all of them have incredible custom abilities!

[![Forge Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge%20Versions-16181c?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=16181c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/incredible-custom-swords/versions?l=forge)
[![NeoForge Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge%20Versions-16181c?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=16181c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/incredible-custom-swords/versions?l=neoforge)

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)

![All the items in version 1.2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a34d6522485ac103c1677098dd8e7a189de1681d.png)
